title: Exhaust muffler
abstract: The invention relates to an exhaust muffler (10) which ensures a silent outlet by distributing the exhaust gas evenly and damping each other in the gas outlet line (12) with small curved muffler pipes (13).
claims: Claims 1. The invention is related to an exhaust muffler (10) and is characterized in that said exhaust muffler (10) has muffler pipes (13) which provide a homogeneous distribution of exhaust gases in the gas inlet line (1 1 ) and which provides the exhaust gases to collide and dampen each other in the gas outlet line (12). 2. Exhaust muffler (10) as in Claim 1 , characterized in that the gas outlet openings of said exhaust muffler pipes (13) will face one another, with a distance of 5 - 6 cm between them.
